title: distephanus angolensis
intro: Distephanus angolensis, also known as the Angola distephanus, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Distephanus angolensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
